task: Compare the first and second most popular smartphones manufactured by Xiaomi and show the comparison chart.
final_result_response:
I have successfully completed the task. Here's a summary of what was done:

1. **Navigated to versus.com** and went to the Smartphones section
2. **Sorted by Popularity** and **filtered by Xiaomi** brand
3. **Identified the two most popular Xiaomi smartphones:**
   - **#1 Most Popular:** Xiaomi Poco X7 Pro ($435, 74 Points)
   - **#2 Most Popular:** Xiaomi Redmi Note 14 Pro ($420, 56 Points)
4. **Opened the comparison chart** showing a detailed side-by-side comparison with:
   - A **radar chart** comparing Design, Display, Performance, Cameras, Battery, Operating System, Audio, and Connectivity & Features
   - **254 facts** compared across both phones
   - The **Xiaomi Poco X7 Pro** declared as the **Comparison Winner** with advantages including:
     - 9.09% more battery power (6000 mAh vs 5500 mAh)
     - 15.83% faster CPU speed
     - 2x better video recording quality (2160 x 60 fps vs 2160 x 30 fps)
     - 2.28x higher AnTuTu benchmark score (1,663,422 vs 728,840)
     - Wi-Fi 6 support vs Wi-Fi 5
     - 1.74x faster downloads (5700 MBits/s vs 3270 MBits/s)
thoughts: I can see the versus.com homepage. Let me click on "SMARTPHONES" to navigate to the smartphones section.
I'm on the smartphone comparison page. I need to filter by Xiaomi brand and sort by popularity. Let me first change the sort order to "Popularity" by clicking the dropdown.
I can see a select popup opened. Let me select "Popularity" (index 1).
The list is now sorted by Popularity. I can see the brand filter on the left sidebar. Let me search for "Xiaomi" in the brand search field.
The list is now sorted by Popularity. I can see the brand filter on the left sidebar. Let me search for "Xiaomi" in the brand search field.
I can see "Xiaomi" appeared as a filter option. Let me click on it to filter the results.

The Xiaomi filter is applied and sorted by popularity. The top two most popular Xiaomi smartphones are:
1. **Xiaomi Poco X7 Pro** (1st most popular)
2. **Xiaomi Redmi Note 14 Pro** (2nd most popular)

Now I need to compare them. Let me click the "+" button on the first one to add it for comparison.
I can see "1 item selected" at the bottom. The Xiaomi Poco X7 Pro has been added for comparison. Now let me click the "+" button on the second phone (Xiaomi Redmi Note 14 Pro).
Now I can see "2 items selected" at the bottom. Both phones have been added. Let me click the "VS | 2 items selected" button to start the comparison.
It seems I accidentally navigated to a phone detail page instead of initiating the comparison. Let me go back and try again.

Good, I'm back on the listing page with Xiaomi phones sorted by popularity. I can see the top two are **Xiaomi Poco X7 Pro** and **Xiaomi Redmi Note 14 Pro**. Instead of using the "+" buttons, let me directly navigate to the comparison URL for these two phones. But first, let me try clicking the "+" button more precisely on the first phone.
First phone added (1 item selected). Now let me add the second phone (Xiaomi Redmi Note 14 Pro) by clicking its "+" button.
I now have "2 items selected" shown at the bottom. Now let me click on the "VS | 2 items selected" button to launch the comparison. I need to click on the "VS" part of the button, not the arrow.
The button seems to be navigating to a product page rather than the comparison. Let me try a direct approach by navigating to the comparison URL.

The comparison chart is now displayed! I can see the **Xiaomi Poco X7 Pro vs Xiaomi Redmi Note 14 Pro** comparison page. The Xiaomi Poco X7 Pro is marked as the "COMPARISON WINNER" with 74 Points vs 56 Points. Let me scroll down to see more of the comparison details.

The comparison chart between the two most popular Xiaomi smartphones is now displayed successfully. The page shows:

**Xiaomi Poco X7 Pro vs Xiaomi Redmi Note 14 Pro** — with 254 facts in comparison, a radar chart comparing categories (Design, Display, Performance, Cameras, Battery, Operating System, Audio, Connectivity & Features), and scores of **74 Points vs 56 Points**. The Poco X7 Pro is the comparison winner.

The comparison highlights show why the Poco X7 Pro is better:
- 9.09% more battery power (6000 mAh vs 5500 mAh)
- 15.83% faster CPU speed
- 2x better video recording quality
- 2.28x higher AnTuTu benchmark score
- Better Wi-Fi version (Wi-Fi 6)
- 1.74x faster downloads

The task is complete — the comparison chart for the first and second most popular Xiaomi smartphones is now displayed on the screen.
